headline: Here Are Thursday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Adobe, Airbnb, ARM Holdings, Bank of America, CAVA Group, Robinhood Markets, Spotify, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading lower as we head into Thursday, and depending on today’s narrative about how the war in Iran is progressing, whatever is revealed could chart the stock market’s course once again. Stocks were up across the board on Wednesday after the United States announced a 15-point peace plan for Iran, ... headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies (WAB) After Strong Multi‑Year Gains?
summary: If you are wondering whether Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies at around US$248 per share still offers value, the starting point is understanding what the current price actually reflects. The stock has returned 4.4% over the last week, 14.8% year to date, and 33.0% over the past year, with a 5.6% decline over the last 30 days and very large gains across the past 3 and 5 years. These moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing interest in rail and transportation equipment, including investor...
